title: Vision Objects - Using OCR Objects - Creating a New OCR Object
description:
Vision Objects - Using OCR Objects - Creating a New OCR Object

Creating a New OCR Object

Click the [All Tools] - the
	  [OCR] button on the Vision Guide
	 toolbar.

You will see an OCR icon
	 appear above the OCR object toolbar button.

Click on the ocr icon and
	 drag to the Image Display Area of the Vision Guide Window.

Notice
	 that a name for the object is automatically created. In the example,
	 it is called "Ocr01" because this is the first OCR object
	 created for this sequence. (We will explain how to change the name
	 later.)
